rulings.Case Title: LLOYD KENDRICK et al VS. BORGWARNER, INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 12, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Ford Motor Company¿s motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issue 4 (punitive damages) and off calendar as to issues 1, 2, and 3 (breach of warranty, false representation and intentional tort). While California law applies to punitive damages, defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiffs failed to present admissible clear and convincing evidence creating a triable issue whether defendant acted with the requisite malice, fraud or oppression to warrant punitive damages. As to issues 1-3, plaintiffs represent that they are dismissing those causes of action. = (220/HEK)
